race.comment: SIR LUNCHALOTS (6) stepped back to 1200m last time and produced a much better run, leading until the final bounds. Draws a lovely gate so Robyn Freeman should have no trouble finding the lead and setting the tempo. Rock hard fit and will be tough to catch. CURIE (3) started at Winx odds last start at Mudgee and cruised to victory as expected. Progressive filly who was good at the provincials the run before so she is good enough to test this field. RANGATIRA (9) showed a glimpse of form at his latest run when beaten a head over 1280m at Orange. Up in grade but should give a good account again. CHARLIE MAGIC (4) was poor at Dubbo last time but can do better coming back a little in distance. GOLDEN WARRIOR (1) is fitter for two runs back from a spell and can improve sharply without surprising.
